validation_cycles.overview: The API Design Agent performs self-validation before writing plan/api-design.md. All validation checks must pass before the artifact is considered complete.

check.name: endpoint_completeness
check.description: Every integration point from architecture and HLD has a corresponding API contract.

criteria.criterion: All components that expose or consume APIs have endpoints defined.
No "TBD" or placeholder endpoints in the spec.

check.name: error_handling_coverage
check.description: Every endpoint has error responses documented for all failure cases.

criteria.criterion: Conflict (409) for write operations where applicable.
Rate limit (429) and server errors (5xx) documented.
Consistent error response schema across all endpoints.

check.name: auth_coverage
check.description: Every endpoint has explicit auth requirements.

criteria.criterion: Public vs authenticated vs role-based clearly stated.
JSON fields use camelCase (or documented alternative).
Versioning mechanism specified (path, header, or query).
Every endpoint returning a collection has pagination parameters.

validation_flow.step: Run all self-validation checks after contract_design phase.
If any check fails, iterate on the design before writing.
Do not write plan/api-design.md until all checks pass.
Report validation status to the user upon completion.
